event: Brigantine sailing ship off the coast of Jersey
description: A maritime painting showing a brigantine sailing ship under full sail in choppy seas off the coast of St. Helier, Jersey. The vessel heels to port with white sails catching the wind, flying flags at its masts. In the foreground, a small rowing boat with several figures navigates the rough waters. A fortified castle or citadel sits atop a rocky promontory on the right side. Additional ships are visible in the distance on the left. The sky is filled with dramatic cumulus clouds, and the sea is rendered with whitecapped waves in blue-green tones.

_meta.title: The 78-Ton Brigantine 'The Advocate' off St. Helier, Jersey
